post.summary: Request a presigned URL for file upload

get.description: Admins receive all tickets with user details; other users receive only their own tickets.

patch.description: JWT required. Users can update themselves; admins can update any user.

delete.description: JWT required. Users can delete themselves; admins can delete any user.

channel.description: Delivery channel for the OTP code

freeDeliveryThreshold.description: Defaulted by the API when not stored on the restaurant row.

scopedShopIds.description: Restricts data to these shops (merchant + employee). Empty = no scope restriction.

contentType.description: MIME type of the file (e.g. image/jpeg).

uploadURL.description: Presigned GCS URL for PUT upload.

objectPath.description: Normalized object path (e.g. /objects/uploads/uuid). Store this in your database.

bearerAuth.description: JWT returned by /auth/login, /auth/verify-otp, or /backend/login. Some HTML document endpoints also accept the same token as a token query parameter.
